label: first-three-route-focus-v3
guardrails: Personas use visible-perception snapshots only: player, HUD progress, visible enemies, visible pickups, visible node/breach, and the same objective arrow visible to a human.
No hidden cache positions, full map geometry, enemy timers, future objectives or direct route-completion hooks are used.
The browser is reused for batches and restarted periodically to expose stale state and memory leaks.
Metrics are warning signals, not proof that BLIP is fun.

findings.finding: Some runs look stuck or soft-lock-prone; inspect mostCommonStuckAreas and screenshots.
Objective routing still stalls some personas.
Weapon use appears varied enough for this pass.
No repeated reward clarity issue detected.
Review representative screenshots for clutter, depth sorting, readable pickups and camera framing.
